## What does this PR do?

<!-- Keep this accurate as commits land — update it whenever scope
changes, and re-check it right before merge. A reviewer should be able
to trust this description without diffing it against the changes.
Tip: run /pre-merge-check in Claude Code to verify all of the below. -->

## Pre-merge checklist (from CLAUDE.md)

- [ ] New/changed behavior has tests (system specs for user-facing
      flows, unit specs where they add value)
- [ ] Full test suite passes (not just the tests for this change)
- [ ] Code is linted/formatted cleanly
- [ ] PR title and description accurately describe the **current** diff
- [ ] Every doc/config this PR makes stale is updated: `README.md`,
      `CLAUDE.md`, `docs/decisions.md` (new entry if this embodies a
      decision), `docs/roadmap.md`, skills under `.claude/skills/`,
      `.env.example`, inline comments
- [ ] If views/UI changed: accessibility skill applied (semantic HTML,
      keyboard flow tested manually, axe assertions in place)
